results.title: Injured Alcaraz withdraws from Wimbledon

results.title: Opinion: America’s nursing crisis is not just a pipeline problem — it is a sustainability problem
results.description: The problem is a combination of both how many nurses we educate and whether the profession remains viable enough for nurses to stay.

results.title: Devin Booker, McDonald's collaborate for Nike Book 2 'Sedona' shoe ad
results.description: Phoenix Suns superstar Devin Booker and McDonald's have their collaborative Nike Book 2 "Sedona" model scheduled for release on June 2.

results.title: Arsenal champions as Man City draw at Bournemouth
results.description: Arsenal’s 22-year wait for the Premier League title is over after rivals Manchester City drew at Bournemouth, in what is expected to be Pep Guardiola’s penultimate game in charge. Tuesday’s result on the south coast leaves Mikel Arteta’s men four points clear of City before the final round of games take place on Sunday, with [...] The post Arsenal champions as Man City draw at Bournemouth appeared first on Kahawatungu .
